description: Letter addressed to ha-Dayyan ha-Maskil (unidentified). In Judaeo-Arabic, with some lines of Hebrew poetry on verso. The sender is unable to repay the 30 dirhams that he owes for food that he bought on credit. The addressee is asked to be patient and to have Abū Manṣūr try to sell the volume of the Torah and apply the proceeds to the debt.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
